name: room in the castle
description: I'm in a room in the castle
hints: There is a big kettle here. Examine it carefully - there may be something underneath.
LOOK KETTLE to discover a hole under it and some soup.
LOOK KETTLE reveals the hole. GO HOLE to descend to room 16 with the rabbit's foot.
LOOK KETTLE reveals the hole. GO HOLE to descend to room 16 for the rabbit's foot (good luck charm). NORTH goes to animal heads room.

effects: Message: I see a hole under it!

notes: Room with the big kettle hiding a hole underneath (leads to room 16 with rabbit's foot). Also has soup. NORTH goes to room 5, WEST to the stairwell.
